title: stellaria longipes var. stricta
intro: Stellaria longipes var. stricta, also known as starry campion or strict longstemmed starry campion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Stellaria longipes var. stricta typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
